creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This PR finishes by making the reccomendation that we ditch fetch and 
use ftp(1) in its place.  This action has been discussed before and it 
seems more likely that we will someday remove the http: capability 
(damn gnats editor...  I meant: "suptid http: capability") from ftp 
instead of removing fetch. 

Somewhere along the discussion of this PR, the originator had his 
question answered too, it seems, so I'm saved that.
